newsSinceJun6: No company-specific material news since June 6. Today's +8.48% move appears flow-driven: a broad K-energy/power-equipment rally on AI data center power demand plus successive sell-side target-price hikes toward ~4M won. The fundamental drivers (Q1 2026 new orders +107% to ~$2.8B, order backlog >15.1tn won, Feb-2026 record $530M US 765kV transformer contract, Memphis capacity expansion) all predate June 6 and are well known. Stock is now Korea's most expensive share and +88% YTD, signaling crowding rather than fresh evidence.

sources.label: BigGo Finance - successive target price revisions to ~4M won on AI/grid demand
Seoul Economic Daily - Hyosung Heavy stock soars on AI power demand, most expensive KOSPI stock
Seoul Economic Daily - Korean power equipment makers clinch record orders on US grid/AI boom (15.1tn won backlog)
Transformer Magazine - Hyosung lands $155M US grid contracts (pre-June, context)

verdicts.rankRationale: On a crowding-sensitive alpha list, an 8.5% flow-driven single-day pop on top of +88% YTD with zero new fundamental evidence since June 6 erodes residual alpha; the name is now Korea's most expensive stock with consensus target hikes chasing it, the opposite of hidden/under-owned.
verdicts.bull: Backlog above 15.1tn won locks in 2-3 years of revenue, Q1 orders doubled YoY, and Memphis/Ulsan capacity ramps through end-2026 keep the US grid/AIDC bottleneck thesis fundamentally intact.
verdicts.neutral: The transformer bottleneck is real but fully recognized: 2026 guidance (~12% revenue growth) and the record backlog are in every sell-side model, so the stock now trades on sector flows rather than information edge.
verdicts.bear: A 53,700% six-year run, retail/passive crowding in the K-energy theme, and a flow-driven melt-up leave the stock exposed to a sharp de-rating on any order-momentum pause, US tariff friction, or transformer capacity catch-up by peers.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New large US/AIDC transformer orders or Memphis-Ulsan capacity ramp updates at Q2 results that re-accelerate backlog growth.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded momentum unwind: any sign of order normalization or sector rotation out of K-energy hits a stock priced for perfection after +88% YTD.
